data.content: Implemented per-knot-id async queueing for nextKnot in src/lib/knots.ts. Added nextKnotQueues Map and withNextKnotSerialization helper mirroring the existing withWriteSerialization pattern. nextKnot now wraps its body with per-id serialization so concurrent calls for the same knot ID queue up, while different IDs proceed independently. Added _pendingNextCount test helper. 4 new tests in knots-write-serialization.test.ts verify same-ID serialization, different-ID concurrency, cleanup, and error recovery. All 1676 tests pass, lint/typecheck/build green. Commit 73ee1b5 pushed to origin/main.
